A finale worthy of the greatest Six Nations everHistory, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - and a thrilling finale. The 2026 Six Nations is likely to go down as the best edition in the tournament's history. https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-union/articles/cjd9m3p55y7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-union/articles/cjd9m3p55y7o#0 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 00:40:19 GMT

We expect government help in a crisis. Iraq taking private plane to Mexico for World Cup play-offIraq will travel to Mexico by private plane for their World Cup play-off despite calls from coach Graham Arnold to postpone the match amid the escalating US-Israeli war with Iran, the country's FA president Adnan Dirjal says. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/c0k10zzjk6yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/c0k10zzjk6yo#1 Sat, 14 Mar 2026 23:56:28 GMT
An eccentric new friend entered her life. Then things took a strange, expensive turnWhat began as a dog-sitting favour ended with boutique owner Bridget Hutchcroft being owed more than £1.6m. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5yvpl9jlpeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5yvpl9jlpeo#2 Sun, 15 Mar 2026 00:42:18 GMT
